meta.description: We build websites and AI automations for businesses. Dashboards, AI agents, integrations. Constanța · Romania · Remote.

hero.title: We build websites and AI automations that actually deliver.
hero.subtitle: Dashboards, AI agents, integrations. For businesses that want more than a brochure site.

websites.title: Professional websites
websites.body: Fast, SEO-optimized, responsive websites. For clients who need a real digital presence — not another template.

ai.title: AI agents & automations
ai.body: Automated email processing, content generation, decision-making agents. We integrate OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini — we pick what fits.

internal.title: Internal apps & dashboards
internal.body: Internal platforms that replace hours of manual work. Secure auth, real-time monitoring, exports in any format you need.

projects.sectionSubtitle: Things we've shipped for real clients.

banciuCostin.title: Banciu Costin
banciuCostin.body: Digital presence for a legal industry specialist. Optimized for performance, SEO, and conversion — visitors become contact requests.

aurasjobs.title: Aurasjobs
aurasjobs.body: Processes candidate emails automatically, generates personalized responses, manages the proposal → approval → send flow. Built for a cruise ship recruitment firm.

stereocad.title: Stereocad
stereocad.body: Auto-generates cadastral documents for a specialist firm. Passwordless magic-link auth, real-time stage monitoring, no passwords to manage.

contact.sectionSubtitle: I respond within 24 business hours. Constanța · Remote · Worldwide.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js and care for details.
